title: Peruvian Chicken Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy Peruvian-inspired stir fry dish made with tender chicken, crunchy vegetables, and savory Peruvian spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the skillet and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the potatoes and cook until they start to soften.
Add the jjante and cook until the potatoes are tender.
Add the soy sauce, peruvian pepper, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to coat with the sauce.
Serve the chicken and vegetable mixture hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
Cook the chicken to an internal temperature of at least 165°F (74°C).
